name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES state, turn
CONSTANT N

(* Helper definitions *)
Idle(p) == state[p] = "idle"
Trying(p) == state[p] = "trying"
Critical(p) == state[p] = "critical"

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state ∈ [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ turn ∈ 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "idle"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
        /\ turn' = turn

      \/ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "trying"
        /\ turn = p
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
        /\ turn' = turn

      \/ \E p \in 1..N :
        /\ state[p] = "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
        /\ turn' = IF p = N THEN 1 ELSE p + 1

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

(* Invariant: Mutual exclusion *)
MutualExclusion == \A p, q \in 1..N : p /= q => ~(Critical(p) /\ Critical(q))

(* Safety property: Mutual exclusion holds *)
Safety == MutualExclusion

(* Liveness property: Every process eventually enters critical section *)
Liveness == \A p \in 1..N : <> Critical(p)

(* Combined property *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state /\ Safety /\ Liveness

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, messages, decision
ParticipantState == {"init", "prepared", "committed", "aborted"}

\* Message types
MessageType == {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}

\* Message structure
Message == [type: MessageType, from: ANY, to: ANY]

\* Initial state
Init == /\ participants = 1..N
      /\ coordinator \in participants
      /\ state = [p \in participants |-> "init"]
      /\ messages = {}
      /\ decision = "none"

\* Sending a message
SendMsg(msg) == /\ msg \in Message
               /\ messages' = messages \cup {msg}
               /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state, decision>>

\* Receiving a message
ReceiveMsg(msg) == /\ msg \in messages
                 /\ messages' = messages \ {msg}
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state, decision>>

\* Coordinator actions
CoordinatorAction ==
    \/ /\ decision = "none"
       /\ /\ messages = {}
          /\ /\ state[coordinator] = "init"
          /\ /\ \E p \in participants \ {coordinator} :
                /\ state[p] = "init"
                /\ /\ SendMsg([type: "Prepare", from: coordinator, to: p])
                /\ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "prepared"]
                /\ /\ decision' = "none"
                /\ /\ messages' = messages \cup {[type: "Prepare", from: coordinator, to: p]}
       \/ /\ decision = "none"
          /\ /\ \E msg \in messages :
                /\ msg.type = "VoteYes"
                /\ msg.to = coordinator
                /\ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![msg.from] = "committed"]
                /\ /\ decision' = "none"
                /\ /\ messages' = messages \ {msg}
          \/ /\ decision = "none"
              /\ /\ \E msg \in messages :
                    /\ msg.type = "VoteNo"
                    /\ msg.to = coordinator
                    /\ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![msg.from] = "aborted"]
                    /\ /\ deci

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, states
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Hungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
Thinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
Eating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

FreeLeft(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] = 0
FreeRight(i) == forks[RightFork(i)] = 0

CanEat(i) == Hungry(i) /\ FreeLeft(i) /\ FreeRight(i)

TakeLeft(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i]
TakeRight(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RightFork(i)] = i]
PutLeft(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = 0]
PutRight(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![RightFork(i)] = 0]

Next == \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ Thinking(i) /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ CanEat(i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ Eating(i)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = 0, ![RightFork(i)] = 0]
        \/ /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ Eating(i)
          /\ forks[i] = 0
          /\ states' = states
          /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>> /\ TypeOK

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i.
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number. *)

Init ==
  /\ num \in [1..N -> 0]
  /\ flag \in [1..N -> FALSE]

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    /\ flag[i] := TRUE
    /\ LET maxNum == MAX(num)

    /\ flag[i] := FALSE
    /\ \A j \in 1..N :
        j # i =>
          \E k \in 1..N :
            /\ flag[k] = FALSE
            /\ num[k] = 0
            /\ num[i] > num[k]
            /\ (num[i] = num[k] /\ i < k)

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
  /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* --algorithm BoundedFIFO *)
define
  full == size = K
  empty == size = 0
  nextTail == IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
  nextHead == IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
  put(x) == q' = Append(q, x) /\ head' = head /\ tail' = nextTail /\ size' = size + 1
  get(x) == q' = Remove(q, x) /\ head' = nextHead /\ tail' = tail /\ size' = size - 1
  putOrGet(x) == IF full THEN get(x) ELSE put(x)
  getOrPut(x) == IF empty THEN put(x) ELSE get(x)

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

ReadRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

WriteAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

WriteRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == 
  \/ ReadAcquire
  \/ ReadRelease
  \/ WriteAcquire
  \/ WriteRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Channels

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
    /\ channel \in [1..N -> 1..N -> Seq(Nat)]
    /\ marker \in [1..N -> 1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ snapshot \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ channelState \in [1..N -> 1..N -> Seq(Nat)]
    /\ markerReceived \in [1..N -> 1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N, j \in 1..N : 
        (i = j) => 
            /\ channel[i][j] = <<>>
            /\ marker[i][j] = FALSE
            /\ markerReceived[i][j] = FALSE
            /\ channelState[i][j] = <<>>
        /\ (i # j) => 
            /\ channel[i][j] \in Seq(Nat)
            /\ marker[i][j] \in BOOLEAN
            /\ markerReceived[i][j] \in BOOLEAN
            /\ channelState[i][j] \in Seq(Nat)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ channel = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
    /\ marker = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]
    /\ snapshot = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
    /\ markerReceived = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]

(* Sending a normal message from process i to process j *)
SendMsg(i, j, m) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ i # j
    /\ channel[i][j] = Append(channel[i][j], m)

(* Sending a marker from process i to process j *)
SendMarker(i, j) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ i # j
    /\ marker[i][j] = TRUE
    /\ channel[i][j] = Append(channel[i][j], "marker")

(* Receiving a normal message on channel i->j *)
RecvMsg(i, j) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ i # j
    /\ channel[i][j] \in Seq(Nat)
    /\ channel[i][j] # <<>>
    /\ \A m \in 1..N : m \in channel[i][j]
    /\ channel[i][j] = Tail(channel[i][j])
    /\ state[j] = state[j] + 1

(* Receiving a marker on channel i->j *)
RecvMarker(i, j) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ i # j
    /\ channel[i][j] \in Seq(Nat)
    /\ channel[i][j] # <<>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ file \in Seq(1..255)
    /\ chunks \in Seq(1..255)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..255)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..255)

(* Helper definitions *)
chunkCount == Len(chunks)
chunkSize == CHUNK_SIZE
fileSize == FILE_SIZE
maxRetries == MAX_RETRIES

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ file \in Seq(1..255)
    /\ chunks == SubSeq(file, 1, chunkSize) \* Simplified chunking
    /\ sentChunks == <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount == 0
    /\ channel == <<>>

(* Sending a chunk *)
SendChunk == 
    /\ sentChunks' == Append(sentChunks, First(chunks))
    /\ chunks' == Tail(chunks)
    /\ retransmitCount' == 0
    /\ channel' == Append(channel, First(chunks))

(* Retransmitting a chunk *)
RetransmitChunk == 
    /\ sentChunks' == Append(sentChunks, First(chunks))
    /\ chunks' == Tail(chunks)
    /\ retransmitCount' == retransmitCount + 1
    /\ channel' == Append(channel, First(chunks))

(* Non-deterministic channel loss *)
ChannelLoss == 
    /\ channel' == Tail(channel)
    /\ retransmitCount' == retransmitCount + 1

(* Next state *)
Next == 
    \/ /\ chunks # <<>>
       /\ retransmitCount < maxRetries
       /\ SendChunk
    \/ /\ chunks # <<>>
       /\ retransmitCount >= maxRetries
       /\ RetransmitChunk
    \/ /\ channel # <<>>
       /\ ChannelLoss

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, epsilon, maxDrift

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]
  /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Nat]
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: offsets[i] <= maxDrift

(* Initial state: clocks start at 0, offsets random within drift limit *)
Init == 
  /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> RandomOffset(maxDrift)]

(* Helper: generate a random offset within drift limit *)
RandomOffset(max) == 
  CHOOSE d \in 0..max: d

(* Helper: compute average of clocks *)
AvgClocks == 
  LET sum == \Sum i \in 1..N: clocks[i]
  IN sum / N

(* Helper: compute new clock after sync *)
NewClock(i) == 
  LET avg == AvgClocks
  IN avg + offsets[i]

(* Next-state relation: each node updates its clock based on average and its offset *)
Next == 
  /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = NewClock(i)]
  /\ offsets' = offsets  (* Offsets remain constant per round *)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>> /\ TypeOK

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId
Topic == [name: STRING]
Message == [id: Nat, topic: Topic, payload: STRING]
SubscriberId == Nat
PublisherId == Nat

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ subscribers = [t \in Topic |-> {}]
    /\ messages = [t \in Topic |-> <<>>]
    /\ nextMsgId = 1
    /\ nextSubId = 1

(* Actions *)
Register(subId, topic) ==
    /\ subId \in SubscriberId
    /\ topic \in Topic
    /\ subscribers[topic] = subscribers[topic] \cup {subId}

Post(pubId, topic, payload) ==
    /\ pubId \in PublisherId
    /\ topic \in Topic
    /\ payload \in STRING
    /\ msgId = nextMsgId
    /\ msg = [id |-> msgId, topic |-> topic, payload |-> payload]
    /\ messages[topic] = Append(messages[topic], msg)
    /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextSubId>>

Deliver(subId, topic) ==
    /\ subId \in SubscriberId
    /\ topic \in Topic
    /\ subMsgSeq = messages[topic]
    /\ subMsgSeq \in Seq(Message)
    /\ subMsgSeq' = subMsgSeq
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E subId \in SubscriberId, topic \in Topic:
        Register(subId, topic)
    \/ \E pubId \in PublisherId, topic \in Topic, payload \in STRING:
        Post(pubId, topic, payload)
    \/ \E subId \in SubscriberId, topic \in Topic:
        Deliver(subId, topic)

(* Specification *)
Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET SubscriberId]
    /\ messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]
    /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
    /\ nextSubId \in Nat

EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Node
ASSUME Node \subseteq 1..N

VARIABLES counts

(* Type invariant: counts is a function from Node to a function from Node to Nat *)
TypeOK == counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]

(* Initial state: all counts are zero *)
Init == counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

(* Increment operation: node n increments its own counter *)
Inc(n) == counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = @ + 1]

(* Merge operation: element-wise max *)
Merge == counts' = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> Max(counts[n][m], counts'[n][m])]]

(* Next-state relation: either an increment or a merge *)
Next == \E n \in Node : Inc(n) \/ Merge

(* Specification: initial state and next-state relation *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

(* Invariant: all nodes agree on the total count *)
TotalAgree == \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] = counts[m][n]

(* Invariant: total count is the sum of max counts per node *)
TotalCount == \A n \in Node : counts[n][n] = \Sum m \in Node : Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])

(* Invariant: total count is the sum of max counts per node *)

(* Invariant: all nodes agree on the total count *)
